name: BP p.l.c.
description: BP p.l.c. is a global energy company operating in Europe, the Americas, Australasia, Asia, and Africa. The company operates through Gas & Low Carbon Energy, Customers & Products, and Oil Production & Operations segments. It is involved in the production of crude oil and natural gas, refining, marketing, and distribution of petroleum products, as well as the development of low-carbon energy businesses, including wind, solar, and hydrogen power.
